description: Evaluates session management maturity—network and application session-based access, session renewal automation, and enterprise SSO, SSE, and Kerberos integration with identity and enforcement technology.

capabilities.name: Session Based access for network
capabilities.description: Session-based network access is enforced centrally with session renewal automation and frequent re-authentication.

capabilities.name: Session based access for applications
capabilities.description: Session-based application access is enforced per user via centralized servers with session renewal automation and frequent re-authentication.
evaluation_focus: Session-based access per application per user

capabilities.name: Single Sign on / Kerberos
capabilities.description: SSO, SSE, and Kerberos are formally adopted enterprise-wide or for scoped applications and integrated with identity and enforcement technology.
evaluation_focus: Formal adoption of SSO, SSE, or Kerberos
Integration with identity and enforcement technology

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
